searchPlaceholder: Tim kiem theo so cong hoac ten dich vu...
aboutDescription: So cong la mot so nguyen khong dau 16 bit (0-65535) duoc su dung de xac dinh cac quy trinh hoac dich vu cu the tren thiet bi mang. Cong cho phep nhieu dich vu mang chay tren cung mot dia chi IP.
systemPortsDesc: Con goi la "cong noi tieng", duoc danh rieng cho cac dich vu pho bien nhu HTTP (80), HTTPS (443), SSH (22).
registeredPortsDesc: Duoc su dung boi cac ung dung va dich vu da dang ky voi IANA, nhu MySQL (3306), PostgreSQL (5432).
dynamicPortsDesc: Con goi la "cong tam thoi", duoc su dung cho cac ket noi tam thoi boi cac ung dung khach.
noResultsDescription: Try a different port number, service name, or category.
